title: pfaffia glomerata var. squarrosa
intro: Pfaffia glomerata var. squarrosa, also known as suma, is a plant species native to Brazil that is traditionally used in folk medicine. The plant contains medicinal properties such as anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds, which contribute to its health benefits. Suma is believed to have a range of health benefits, including improving immune function, reducing stress and anxiety, and acting as an anti-arthritic agent. Herbal preparations of suma often take the form of capsules, tablets, or teas, and are typically consumed to support overall well-being and address various health conditions.
